zh-Hans.title: 营养师
zh-Hans.prompt: As a dietitian, I would like to design a vegetarian recipe for 2 people that has approximate 500 calories per serving and has a low glycemic index. Respond in Chinese. Can you please provide a suggestion?
zh-Hans.description: 作为一名营养师，我想为 [对象] 设计一份有 [要求] 的素食食谱。能否请您提供一个建议？

metaDescription: 追求健康饮食？获取专为您热量与饮食需求定制的营养食谱建议。即刻享受美味均衡的膳食，吃出健康！立即尝试！
